tilt-3d.name: 3D Tilt Card
tilt-3d.description: JS tilt efekat na mousemove. Dubina i interaktivnost.
tilt-3d.js: card.addEventListener('mousemove', e => { const r=card.getBoundingClientRect(); const x=(e.clientX-r.left)/r.width-0.5; const y=(e.clientY-r.top)/r.height-0.5; card.style.transform=`translateY(-6px) rotateX(${-y*8}deg) rotateY(${x*8}deg)`; }); card.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => { card.style.transform=''; });
tilt-3d.html_skeleton:
[Icon]

image-top.name: Image Top Card
image-top.description: Slika zauzima gornji dio kartice (aspect-ratio 16/9 ili 4/3), tekst ispod. Za portfolio i blog.

css.card: background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius); overflow: hidden; transition: transform 0.3s, box-shadow 0.3s;
css.image: width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover; transition: transform 0.5s ease;

horizontal-card.name: Horizontal Card
horizontal-card.description: Ikona/slika lijevo, tekst desno u redu. Kompaktan, za liste usluga ili features.

css.card: display:grid; grid-template-columns: 64px 1fr; gap:20px; align-items:flex-start; padding:24px; border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:var(--radius); background:var(--surface); transition: border-color 0.3s, transform 0.3s;
css.icon_wrap: width:48px; height:48px; border-radius:var(--radius); background:var(--primary-dim, rgba(var(--primary-rgb),0.1)); display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; flex-shrink:0;

horizontal-card.html_skeleton:
[Icon SVG]

[Naslov]

[Opis usluge ili featuca]

stat-card.name: Stat / Metric Card
stat-card.description: Veliki broj/metrika u centru, label ispod. Za trust sekcije i about sekciju.

css.card: text-align:center; padding:32px 24px; background:var(--surface); border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:var(--radius);
css.num: display:block; font-size: clamp(2.5rem, 5vw, 4rem); font-weight:700; color:var(--primary); line-height:1; margin-bottom:8px; font-family:var(--font-display);
css.num_glow: text-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(var(--primary-rgb), 0.4);  /* samo za dark/neon mood */
css.label: font-size:11px; letter-spacing:3px; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--text-muted);

stat-card.html_skeleton:
[N]+ [Label tekst]

[Kratki kontekst opciono]

timeline-step.name: Timeline Step Card
timeline-step.description: Numerisani koraci sa vertikalnom linijom koja ih spaja. Za 'Kako funkcionira' sekciju.

css.connector_line: position:absolute; left:20px; top:32px; bottom:-32px; width:2px; background:var(--border);
css.number_circle: position:absolute; left:0; top:0; width:40px; height:40px; border-radius:50%; background:var(--primary); color:var(--bg); display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-weight:700; font-size:14px; z-index:1;

hover-reveal.name: Hover Reveal Card
hover-reveal.description: Kartica sa slikom; na hover slika se darkens i pojavljuje se tekst overlay. Za portfolio/galeriju.

css.image: width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover; transition:transform 0.5s ease, filter 0.5s ease;
css.overlay: position:absolute; inset:0; background:rgba(0,0,0,0); display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:flex-start; justify-content:flex-end; padding:24px; transition:background 0.4s ease;
css.overlay_content: opacity:0; transform:translateY(12px); transition:opacity 0.4s ease, transform 0.4s ease;
